wikitext.*:
Users can use [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]] to purchase [[clothing]] items, [[furniture]] and interior items, [[colors]], and [[Locations|flights]] in the in-app shops. [[File:FinchShopBarnew.jpg|thumb|left]]Shops are accessed through the Shop tab, the third tab at the bottom of the app display.
[[File:FinchUpdatedShopTap.png|thumb|left]]

The initial popup makes you choose one of the four shops: [[Mr. Prickles' Shop|Outfit]], [[Finkea Furnishings|Furniture]], [[The Color Studio|Color]] or [[Travel with Sass|Travel]].{{Clear}} 

==Shops==
After you have a shop open, you can switch between shops using the bar at the bottom. [[File:NewShopBar.jpg|thumb|left|300x300px]]{{Clear}}
The four shops are known as: 
*[[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] (outfits)
*[[Finkea Furnishings]] (furniture)
*[[The Color Studio]] (colors)
*[[Travel with Sass|The Travel Agency]] (travel)

==Interface==
Your [[Rainbow Stones]] balance is shown at the top left corner of the Shop interface.. 

At the top right are two important icons: Catalog and Sell. 
[[File:CatalogandSellButtons.jpg|thumb|left]]{{Clear}} 

*'''Catalog''' (magnifying glass and book icon) - this lets you see and ''try out'' every item in the game - but you can't ''buy'' anything here. You must wait for a desired item to come up at random in the shop, unless it's from the [[Everyday Collection]]. 
*'''Sell''' (pouch of rainbow stones) - you can sell unwanted items back to the shop. You get half of the item's cost, so if it was 500 stones, you can get 250. The item will be entirely removed from your inventory.

Below these is a window with your shopkeeper NPC greeting you. 

===Refresh===
[[File:ShopRefresh.jpg|none|300x300px|thumb]]Just below that window is another line of important information: Renewing and Refreshing the shop. The shop automatically refreshes itself every 24 hours, alongside your birb's day hours. On the left, the "Items refresh" countdown shows how long to the next automated refresh. 

However, you can also optionally refresh the shop offerings multiple times per day, on an advancing fee schedule, using the "cycle" 🔄 icon on the right. Your first refresh of the day is free. The next refresh costs 10 rainbow stones. Each additional refresh is more expensive, in increments of 25, thus: 10, 35, 60, 85, 110, 135, 160. The cumulative total is 595 gems. 

(Note that the Travel Agency cannot be refreshed.) 

===Items for sale in rotation=== 
Next are the shop offerings themselves. In the Clothing and Furniture shops, one slot is reserved for [[Locations|location-specific items]], indicated by a little Map marker. Each location has four clothing items in a variety of colors, and four furniture items in four colors. 

Free players are offered five additional items, while [[Finch Plus]] members who support the developers are offered one discount item plus 11 additional items. 

These slots offer items in random rotation. The item is in a specific color which cannot be changed. If you want a specific item in a specific color, you just have to hope that it eventually comes up. There are a couple of factors that slightly influence the offerings: 
*In the month following an [[Seasonal Events|event]], the clothing and furniture from that event will turn up Very Often.  
*In any given month, the anniversary of events in previous years will be celebrated by their items showing up More Often. For example, [[:Category:September|September]] is the anniversary for [[Dino Dash]] (2024), [[Gears and Goggles]] (2023), and the [[Preppy Collection]] (2022). 

Items are otherwise offered at random throughout the year, with two important exceptions: [[:Category:October|October]] and [[:Category:December|December]] items are '''exclusively''' sold in their anniversary month and the two weeks leading up to it. This means that a Halloween item will ''never'' appear in the store the rest of the year.

===Every day offerings===
Below the rotation slots, a range of simple Clothing and Furniture (the [[Everyday Collection]]) is available for purchase every day, in your choice of colors. The shops will only show things you have not already purchased. The collection includes [[Floors]], sold in the Furniture shop. 

==Gifting== 
See [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] for details about gifting from the shop versus your [[Tree Towns|Tree Town]] friend interface.

==Real-life Merch Store== 
:''Main article: [[Finch Merch Shop]]''
In real life, Finch has an online store which sells real-life plushies, pins and other cute items. (They do not sell virtual items to be used inside the app.) You can navigate to [https://shop.finchcare.com/ shop.finchcare.com] from inside the app: on the home screen, click the top left three-line icon and scroll down to "Shop Finch Merch."
